title: Akihito's Flight Core
description: Provides flight logic to my mods, allowing them to be used all at once
body:
**This mod requires Caelus API**

Flight core provides both creative flight and elytra flight logic to my mods, because I noticed that when there's two of my mods being used at the same time they would cancel out each other's flight and neither mod would have working flight, this mod fixes that since now it will handle all flight logic in a single mod so there can't be any clashing issues.
